narrative:
Spencer TWP township has 1,610 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.1 percentage points.
